memberdef.argsstring: (T x, T y, T width, T height)
memberdef.name: Rect

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
x
X coordinate
y
Y coordinate
width
Width
height
Height

@SINCE_1_9.27
rhs
The original object
Reference to this

@SINCE_1_9.27
rhs
The original object
Reference to this

@SINCE_1_9.14
vec4
The Vector4 to assign
Reference to this

memberdef.argsstring: (T newX, T newY, T newWidth, T newHeight)
memberdef.name: Set

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
newX
X coordinate
newY
Y coordinate
newWidth
Width
newHeight
Height

briefdescription.para: Determines whether or not this Rectangle is empty.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
True if width or height are zero

briefdescription.para: Determines whether or not this Rectangle is valid.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_9.18
True if width and height are not negative

briefdescription.para: Gets the left of the rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The left edge of the rectangle

briefdescription.para: Gets the right of the rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The right edge of the rectangle

briefdescription.para: Gets the top of the rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The top of the rectangle

briefdescription.para: Gets the bottom of the rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The bottom of the rectangle

briefdescription.para: Gets the area of the rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
The area of the rectangle

briefdescription.para: Determines whether or not this rectangle and the specified rectangle intersect.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The other rectangle to test against this rectangle
True if the rectangles intersect

briefdescription.para: Intersects this rectangle and the specified rectangle. The result of the intersection is stored in this rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_9.18
rect
The other rectangle to intersect with
True if the rectangles intersect

briefdescription.para: Merges this rectangle and the specified rectangle. The result of the merge is stored in this rectangle.

Inset the rectangle by (dx,dy). If dx is positive, then the sides are moved inwards. If dx is negative, then the sides are moved outwards. The result of the inset is stored in this rectangle. @SINCE_1_9.18.
Determines whether or not this Rectangle contains the specified rectangle.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
other
The other rectangle to test against this rectangle
True if the specified rectangle is contained

@SINCE_1_0.0
True if the rectangle has zero size

briefdescription.para: Template class to create and operate on rectangles. @SINCE_1_0.0.
